content.text: yes — the one confirmed allergy on file for Mira is **egg**, confirmed by Riverdale Pediatrics, with a reaction of mild hives. that's the key thing to pass on to any new caregiver: no egg-containing foods, and to watch for hives if there's any accidental exposure. it's worth giving the caregiver the pediatric office number (Riverdale Pediatrics) so they know who to call if a reaction does happen — evening bookings are your preferred contact window there. i only have one allergy recorded; if there are others you haven't logged yet, just let me know and i'll save them so they show up every time you need them.
